## Summary

Describe the change and why it belongs in `ofxGgmlCore`.

## Core boundary check

- [ ] Change is backend-neutral and belongs in Core.
- [ ] No companion-addon workflow was added to Core.
- [ ] `addon_config.mk` remains correct.
- [ ] No generated files, build outputs, binaries, caches, or models are committed.

## Scripts and docs

- [ ] Script parity was considered.
- [ ] README/docs were updated if behavior changed.
